content.en:
"Any peak half-step perfect controller in the Wudao Tower can compete for ten places, and only these ten peak half-step perfect controllers are qualified to compete with other forces for eighteen places to go to Shilongyuan. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And how many peak half-step perfect controllers there were in the Wudao Tower, he didn't know very well.

He only knew that there were many, many half-step perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower, and even forces like the Azure Pavilion had hundreds of half-step perfect controllers, so he could imagine how many half-step perfect controllers there would be in the Daoless Tower.

Therefore, the competition is fierce this time.

However, Ye Tian was very confident in himself.

After all, this time there was no half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm to participate, everyone was a peak half-step perfect controller, and he absorbed a large amount of Extreme Creation Golden Liquid, even if he was also a perfect half-step perfect master, others were not as good as him.

Moreover, he also has a large number of perfect imprints, which is also an advantage.

Also, he has a lot of perfect-level ancestral endowments.

The only pity is that he has not perfected his own way to perfection, which is considered a weakness, but it has little impact.

In terms of overall strength, he is definitely an almost invincible existence among the peak half-step perfect controllers, and only a very small number of peak half-step perfect controllers are qualified to compete with him.

Time passed slowly, and soon a large number of peak half-step perfect controllers applied to sign up, competing for ten places.

Ye Tian naturally signed up.

Soon after, registration closes.

Airplanes!!!!

The Daoless Tower was urged by the higher-ups to create a space-time battlefield.

The registered half-step perfect controllers will enter the areas of this space-time battlefield to fight each other, and each peak half-step perfect controller defeats the opponent to advance, and once defeated, there is a second chance to fight, once both times are defeated, they will be directly declared eliminated.

The time of this space-time battlefield passes quickly, and the super fast time lapse is blessed by the perfect controller, which is also to ensure that the selection quota for this field can end quickly.

Otherwise, with the strength of the peak half-step perfect controller, once it falls into a stalemate, maybe it will fight for an incomparably long time, and the Wudao Tower will not be able to wait!

......

Airplanes!

Ye Tian directly entered the space-time battlefield through the branch tower of the Daoless Tower, and another peak half-step perfect controller of the Daoless Tower also appeared here.

Ye Tian didn't know each other, after all, there were too many peak half-step perfect controllers of the Wudao Tower, and many peak half-step perfect controllers were hundreds of thousands or even millions of eternal years as soon as they retreated.

And Ye Tian hadn't specifically inquired about the members of the Wudao Tower, so he didn't know much about them.

However, by copying the talents, Ye Tian also knew their names and titles.

"Master of the Golden Dust!"

At this time.

The master of the golden dust was also looking at Ye Tian, and he didn't know Ye Tian either.

But among the Daoless Towers, there were only those who were powerful peak half-step perfect controllers, and he knew almost all of them, and Ye Tian was obviously not one of them.

Therefore, he felt that Ye Tian should be the peak half-step perfect controller who had just been promoted.

However, the battle soon began, and he was confused.

Bang!!!!

As soon as Ye Tian made a move, he directly crushed the gold dust controller.

During the battle, dense perfect marks appeared on Ye Tian's body, which made the golden dust controller directly dumbfounded.

"What, how is it possible that he has comprehended so many perfect marks?"

The gold dust controller said in confusion.

Although he had reached the peak half-step Perfect Controller realm, he had actually mastered only a few dozen perfect marks, and he felt that he was already very remarkable.

can be compared with Ye Tianyi, it's too hard!

"Who is this guy, such a demon, why haven't you heard of it?"

The Golden Dust Controller wondered.

Soon, the Golden Dust Ruler was defeated.

And he inquired about Ye Tian, and it didn't take long for him to hear some information about Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, the Endless Master, has only joined the Daoless Tower for a long time, and has entered the Blood War Capital, and won the first place on the Blood War List in less than 10,000 Eternal Years, and has maintained it until he left the Blood War Capital, and he is still the first place in the Blood War List!!"

The Golden Dust Keeper gasped.

He also knew a little about the Blood War Capital, but he hadn't been there.

However, what a terrifying talent it is to be able to suppress those demons who have entered the Blood War Capital in 10,000 Eternal Ages or even close to 100,000 Eternal Ages, and monopolize the first 90,000 Eternal Years in the Blood War List!

"I'm not wronged if I lose!"

The Golden Dust Controller muttered.

Time passed, Ye Tian participated in one battle after another, and won each time.

And he defeated more and more peak half-step perfect controllers, and his fame also went out, and many peak half-step perfect controllers knew about his existence.

All of a sudden, Ye Tian was really famous in the Wudao Tower.

......

"Ye Tian's strength has increased so much?"

When the Lord of Blood Separation learned about Ye Tian's achievements, he was immediately surprised.

He knew very well that it hadn't been long since Ye Tiancai broke through to a half-step perfect controller, but he had gone to the Blood War Capital, and not long after he came back, he actually had the strength he had now.

This kind of strength increase speed is terrifying!

"Demons, demons that have never been seen before!"

The Lord of Blood Separation commented.

He felt that Ye Tian must be 100% able to enter the Extreme Creation Realm Half-Step Perfect Controller Realm, and at present, there were only thirty-three half-step Perfection Controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm of the Daoless Tower, if Ye Tian broke through, there would be one more half-step Perfect Controller of the Infinite Dao Tower.

And at this moment, many high-level officials of the Wudao Tower were also surprised, and they paid more attention to Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian is already a peak half-step perfect controller, and he has absorbed so much Extreme Creation Gold Liquid, there is a 100% chance of becoming a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm in the future!

And a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm is no different from a perfect controller in terms of status.

Ye Tian has grown up in such a short period of time, so he naturally deserves their great attention.

Time passed, and one by one peak half-step perfect controllers were eliminated, and the remaining peak half-step perfect controllers became stronger and stronger, but Ye Tian still did not encounter an opponent worthy of his serious treatment.

He's crushing along the way, or winning the battle by a relatively high margin.

In the end, there were only ten peak half-step perfect controllers left, and there was no need to continue the battle, after all, the quota had already been set, and there was no need to divide the specific ranking.

"I finally got a place, it's quite easy, I instinctively thought that I needed to go through a lot of hard battles!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, he also had a clear understanding of his own strength, and he was indeed a very powerful existence among the peak half-step perfect controllers.

Subsequently, the high-level officials of the Wudao Pagoda summoned Ye Tian and them to participate in the competition for the place of Shilongyuan after an eternal year, so they had an eternal year to prepare.

However, in this eternal era, one must not attack the Perfect Controller or the Extreme Realm Half-Step Perfect Master, otherwise he will be disqualified.

After all, entering Shilongyuan this time was originally an opportunity for the peak half-step perfect controller, but not for the perfect controller and the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

Therefore, cultivation must be maintained at the peak of the half-step perfect controller, and must not break through.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, an eternal age passed.

this day.

The ten half-step perfect masters of the Daoless Tower's quota gathered in front of the Daoless Tower's No. 6 Tower.

Soon, a perfect master appeared.

Ye Tian looked at these perfect controllers, and sensed their talents with their copying talents, and was suddenly a little surprised.

"Everyone has a perfect level ancestral endowment!"

Ye Tian immediately copied their perfect-grade ancestral endowment.

Judging from the aura, the strength of these perfect controllers is much stronger than that of the Blood Separation Lord, and Ye Tian doesn't know how powerful they are.

Subsequently, these perfect controllers briefly introduced themselves.

Among them, the perfect controller of the team leader is one of the thirteen tower masters of the Daoless Tower, and also the tower master of Tower No. 6 - the Lord of Time!

At this time, the Lord of Time spoke: "This time, I will lead the team and take you to Shilongyuan, I hope you can get one of the eighteen places to enter Shilongyuan, now come with me!"

Immediately, the Lord of Time took Ye Tian and them out of the Wudao Tower Headquarters, shuttled through the void, and headed for Shilongyuan.

In an instant, they left the ruins of eternity.

Obviously, Shi Longyuan was not in the Ruins of Eternity, but in a far away Realm area.

And the speed of the perfect controllers was very fast, and they easily crossed the area, which was many times faster than Ye Tian and their speed.

Not long after, Shi Longyuan arrived!

And here in Shilongyuan, there is an incomparably huge giant city.

This giant city is called Shilong Holy City, which is under the jurisdiction of major forces, and it is also the fortress responsible for guarding Shilongyuan.

Soon, Ye Tian and the others entered the Stone Dragon Holy City.

And the perfect controllers of other forces and the half-step perfect controllers also came one by one.

For Ye Tian, this harvest is not only a matter of places, but also many perfect-level ancestors.

Many powerful perfection-level controllers appeared this time, and Ye Tian couldn't find them normally, and the copying talent couldn't penetrate into their cultivation place.

But this time, Ye Tian could easily copy the perfect-level ancestral endowment on their bodies.

All of a sudden, Ye Tian had a lot more perfect-level ancestral endowments on his body, which was an unexpected gain.
